logs.description: Logs are a woodcutting resource used in Firemaking and Fletching.
logs.acquisition: They are usually gathered from Normal Trees with Woodcutting at level 1.
logs.uses: They are used in Firemaking, and in Fletching to make Normal Longbow (u), Normal Shortbow (u), Plain Staff (Wood), Wooden Handle, and Wooden Shafts.

maple_handle.description: A wooden component used as the base for strapped tool and weapon recipes.
maple_handle.acquisition: It is made through Fletching with a Knife from Maple Logs at level 30.
maple_handle.uses: It is used in Crafting to make Maple Handle w/ Strap.

maple_handle_strapped.description: A strapped wooden component used in tool and weapon crafting.
maple_handle_strapped.acquisition: It is made in Crafting at level 30 in the inventory using Maple Handle x1 and Wolf Leather x1.
maple_handle_strapped.uses: It is used in Crafting to make Adamant Axe, Adamant Pickaxe, and Adamant Sword.

maple_headless_arrows.description: A bundled arrow component used in Fletching.
maple_headless_arrows.acquisition: It is made through Fletching at level 32 using Maple Shafts x15 and Feathers x15.
maple_headless_arrows.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Adamant Arrows x15.

maple_logs.description: Maple Logs are a woodcutting resource used in Firemaking and Fletching.
maple_logs.acquisition: They are usually gathered from Maple Trees with Woodcutting at level 30.
maple_logs.uses: They are used in Firemaking, and in Fletching to make Maple Handle, Maple Longbow (u), Maple Shafts, Maple Shortbow (u), and Plain Staff (Maple).

maple_longbow.description: A finished bow made through Fletching.
maple_longbow.acquisition: It is made by stringing Maple Longbow (u) with Bow String at level 32.
maple_longbow.uses: It can be sold to Advanced Fletcher.

maple_longbow_u.description: An unfinished bow that needs Bow String before it can be finished.
maple_longbow_u.acquisition: It is made through Fletching with a Knife from Maple Logs at level 32.
maple_longbow_u.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Maple Longbow.

maple_shafts.description: A bundle of shafts used in Fletching arrow recipes.
maple_shafts.acquisition: It is made through Fletching with a Knife from Maple Logs at level 31.
maple_shafts.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Maple Headless Arrows x15.

maple_shortbow.description: A finished bow made through Fletching.
maple_shortbow.acquisition: It is made by stringing Maple Shortbow (u) with Bow String at level 34.
maple_shortbow.uses: It can be sold to Advanced Fletcher.

maple_shortbow_u.description: An unfinished bow that needs Bow String before it can be finished.
maple_shortbow_u.acquisition: It is made through Fletching with a Knife from Maple Logs at level 34.
maple_shortbow_u.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Maple Shortbow.

normal_longbow.description: A finished bow made through Fletching.
normal_longbow.acquisition: It is made by stringing Normal Longbow (u) with Bow String at level 3.
normal_longbow.uses: It can be sold to Advanced Fletcher.

normal_longbow_u.description: An unfinished bow that needs Bow String before it can be finished.
normal_longbow_u.acquisition: It is made through Fletching with a Knife from Logs at level 3.
normal_longbow_u.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Normal Longbow.

normal_shortbow.acquisition: It is made by stringing Normal Shortbow (u) with Bow String at level 5.

normal_shortbow_u.description: An unfinished bow that needs Bow String before it can be finished.

normal_shortbow_u.uses: It is used in Fletching to make Normal Shortbow.
